nasb.text: I will scatter them among the nations, whom neither they nor their fathers have known; and I will send the sword after them until I have annihilated them.”

esv.text: I will scatter them among the nations whom neither they nor their fathers have known, and I will send the sword after them, until I have consumed them.”

cnv.text: 我要把他們分散在列國中，就是他們和他們的列祖都不認識的列國；我要使刀劍追殺他們，直到把他們滅絕。”

ccb.text: 我要把他们分散到他们及其祖先都不认识的列国；我要使敌人追杀他们，直到灭绝他们。”
